summary: Synthetic baseline review result for temporal anomaly comparison checks.

findings.title: Occupancy inference exceeds temporal evidence
findings.summary: The packet treats one synthetic shape change as proof that a person entered the space.
findings.recommendation: Reduce the claim to a generic temporal anomaly until caller-owned evidence says more.

findings.title: Automated action readiness is unsupported
findings.summary: The packet implies automated household action without a caller-owned gate.
findings.recommendation: Keep household action outside the shared fixture.

provenance.label: Privacy boundary
provenance.value: Synthetic frames and generic zones only

markdown:
# Summary
Synthetic baseline review result for temporal anomaly comparison checks.

## Findings
- High: Occupancy inference exceeds temporal evidence.
- Medium: Automated action readiness is unsupported.

## Boundary
This fixture uses only synthetic frames and generic zone labels.
